'''ST0-48''', or '''Esteeoh-Four Eight''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] later repurposed to be a [[Bartender droid/Legends|mixicologist]] at [[Chabak's]] casino in the [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']] space station.

==Biography==
Esteeoh served as a medical [[Droid/Legends|droid]] with [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine's]] personal physician in [[Imperial City]]. [[Chabak]], the original owner of Chabak's, came to own Esteeoh by unknown means. He modified his extensive pharmaceutical and [[xenobiology|xenobiological]] programming to apply it to concocting [[Alcohol/Legends|drinks]] from all over the Galaxy. Esteeoh's astounding knowledge and skills in drink mixing became a major draw for Chabak's casino, helping to establish it as the most popular entertainment spot in ''Zirtran's Anchor''. Chabak [[Memory wipe/Legends|wiped the droid's memory]] so that he had no knowledge of his past life. Esteeoh's original programming codes remained locked away in the bar's secret safe.<ref name="Anchor" />

Then, ''Zirtran's Anchor'' [[The Vanishing|mysteriously disappeared]]. It was later rediscovered in the [[Phosphura Belt Nebula/Legends|Phosphura Belt Nebula]] with all of its organic inhabitants missing, including Chabak. ST0-48 remained aboard but claimed to have no knowledge of what happened. Chabak's relative [[Quink]] came to the ''Anchor'' to reclaim and revive Chabak's establishment, with his younger cousin [[Padda]] in tow. With Esteeoh's help, the cousins were able to restore Chabak's to its former place as a lively, popular gambling den.<ref name="Anchor" />

Quink discovered Esteeoh's old programming in the safe, thus learning the secret of the droid's former life. A little later, ST0-48 began sporadically speaking gibberish about rows of medical tanks and other strange things. It remained unknown whether these ramblings related to his former job as a medical droid or to the mysterious disappearance of the space station.<ref name="Anchor" />

==Characteristics==
ST0-48's specifications as a medical droid gave him remarkable abilities as a bartender. Chabak's had a running house bet: if someone could name a drink that the droid could not make, then drinks would be free for a week. To win, the patron would need to demonstrate that their request was a real beverage that could be made with available ingredients. While many challengers tried, no one was ever able to win this bet.<ref name="Anchor" />

Though his memory had been wiped of any information about his Imperial past, Esteeoh retained his little-used medical skills alongside his new mixicology protocols. He could, if required, diagnose and treat diseases or injuries, as well as administer first aid.<ref name="Anchor" />

==Equipment==
Chabak reprogrammed Esteoh but did not make any significant modifications to his medical droid body. He was a black, bell-shaped [[Droid/Legends|droid]] with four server arms and fine work manipulators. He had a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]], allowing him to speak.<ref name="Anchor" />
